description:
My first problem.  For beginners...

This is a variation off something from a game I played on KGS.  In the game, he (black) had one more eye than in this problem, but still lost part of the group.  Considering he was 11k and there was no time limit, I was surprised he missed it.

Edit: Thanks for the corrections from Dudzik on some variations.
